changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE group_permission ADD CONSTRAINT fk_group_permission_group FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES "group" (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, ADD CONSTRAINT fk_group_permission_permission FOREIGN KEY (permission_id) REFERENCES permission (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, ADD CONSTRAINT uq_group_permission_membership UNIQUE (group_id, permission_id);
